brand.name: Ai-Smeta
brand.description: AI-generated construction estimates and investor pitch decks

hero.title: Smetas and investor decks — in minutes, not days.
hero.subtitle: A voice note or a .docx goes in. A polished document comes out. One tool, two of construction's biggest bottlenecks.

features.title: Two modules, one platform
features.smeta_body: Send a voice note or text — get a line-itemed cost estimate with cited rates. Edit, approve, export to Excel.
features.deck_body: Upload a .docx brief — get a 17-slide bilingual deck in McKinsey style. Download as PDF.
features.rates_body: Every approved Smeta strengthens your private rate catalog. More projects — smarter AI.

how.title: How it works
how.step1_body: Voice, text, .docx, photos — whatever you have, send it.
how.step2_body: Claude Sonnet 4.6 structures the data and prepares a draft.
how.step3_body: Edit lines, approve, export. Document ready.

cta.title: Ready to move 10× faster?
cta.subtitle: Sign up, upload your first project — free during beta.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Free during closed beta for early customers. Get in touch.

demo.title: Live demo
demo.subtitle: See a real pitch deck prepared via Ai-Smeta for the governor of Issyk-Kul Oblast.

login.title: Sign in to Ai-Smeta
login.subtitle: Enter your email — we'll send you a sign-in link.

verify.title: Check your email
verify.subtitle: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it to sign in.

errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.empty_body: Create a Smeta or an investor deck in minutes.

projects.title: Projects
projects.empty_body: Start by creating a new project.

new_project.title: New project
new_project.subtitle: Choose a type — Smeta or investor deck.
new_project.smeta_body: Line-itemed cost estimate for a construction project. AI drafts it, you approve.
new_project.deck_body: Multi-slide deck in McKinsey style. Bilingual RU+EN.

settings.title: Settings
settings.billing_stub: All features are free during the beta.

rates.title: Rate database
rates.subtitle: The firm's moat — more approved Smetas = smarter AI.
